avatar_generation_guidance.preferred_reference_mode: Use the usable rows as loose visual references for fictional avatars and clothing recreation.
metahuman_notes: Preserve broad age, build, grooming, and clothing silhouette cues, not identity.
When clothing is visible, keep the item type and layering but change logos, text, insignia, and exact styling.
For scene_reference_only rows, do not infer a precise outfit; use them only for general crowd-scene context.
